narrative:
Precinct Harrison West & Hollansburg (precinct in Darke County) has 599 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.5 percentage points.
